name: Enza 21.5" Marble Table Lamp - TBL3027 - White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with elegance through the Enza Table Lamp. Featuring a marble body, this lamp brings a touch of sophistication to any room. The white marble design provides a sleek, contemporary look that complements a variety of decor styles. Topped with a fabric shade, the Enza table lamp creates a warm, inviting glow perfect for relaxation or focused tasks. Whether it graces your bedside, desk, or living room, this lamp enhances your environment, offering a refined aesthetic. With its understated beauty and timeless material, the Enza table lamp is a versatile addition to your home, blending seamlessly into diverse spaces.
